{{Infobox artifact
| name = Moon’s Eye
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moon’s Eye]] was [[Mercy]]'s [[Archlord]] reward for surviving the second round.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Moon’s Eye]] is used for aiming.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] used her [[Moon’s Eye]] lens to count the [[Irons]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
